state_description: Water and waste other residual incumbent placeholder carrying the calibrated residual activity through normal family-state inputs and emissions.
cost_components_summary: No separate non-commodity residual cost is calibrated. Commodity inputs and carbon costs are priced by normal solver semantics.
input_basis_notes: Commodity quantities migrated from residual_overlays.csv native_quantity_2025 fields; the demand anchor is 1 residual_activity so coefficients equal calibrated 2025 residual quantities.
emissions_boundary_notes: Residual calibration emissions are represented directly on the residual incumbent state. Electricity-related emissions are excluded from residual end-use coefficients and flow through electricity supply.
rollout_limit_notes: Single residual incumbent route; scenario control is by enabling or disabling the family route.
availability_conditions: Available in all milestone years as a coarse calibration placeholder until explicit families are authored.
evidence_summary: Derived from the migrated residual overlay calibration layer and official Australian energy and inventory closure totals.
derivation_method: Mechanical migration from residual overlay rows into a single family-state incumbent route with demand anchor 1.0.
review_notes: Residual stub for closure and scenario accounting, not an optimisable technology representation.
candidate_expansion_pathway: Split into explicit omitted-sector families or process chains when source data support them.
times_or_vedalang_mapping_notes: Can map to a fixed calibration demand process with explicit commodity inputs or direct emissions.
balance_tuning_note: Residual calibration stub migrated from the overlay layer.
benchmark_balance_note: Participates in solver demand, commodity, emissions, and cost reporting through normal family-state semantics.
